steps.title: Distribute the factor
steps.content: Use the distributive property. Multiply $7$ by the $x^2$ term and also multiply $7$ by the constant term inside the parentheses.

steps.title: Simplify the expression
steps.content: The products are $7x^2$ and $35$, so the equivalent expression is: $$ 7(x^2+5)=7x^2+35 $$ The answer is A.
